Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 26 

IS_MEDICARE_PARTB 

LABEL: Identify if the Patient is Enrolled in Medicare Part B 

DESCRIPTION: Identify if the patient is enrolled in Medicare Part B at the time of enrollment in the project. 

SHORT NAME: IS_MEDICARE_PARTB 

LONG NAME: IS_MEDICARE_PARTB 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Demographic 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry
